# Jose Romero — Senior Product Designer

Jose Romero is a senior product designer based in Zaragoza, Spain, with 12 years
of professional experience across digital product design, conversion rate
optimisation (CRO), behavioral economics, and design operations.
He works in English and Spanish at professional level (C1 English).

## Current role
Senior Product Designer at Garaje de Ideas / Groupe EDG, embedded full-time
within IKEA's New Business Platform team in Spain. Working on:
- IKEA Home Services: peer-to-peer home improvement services marketplace.
  500,000+ downloads, 21,000 service requests, 4.9/5 satisfaction.
  Live in seven Spanish cities as of 2026.
- IKEA Second-hand Marketplace: peer-to-peer resale of IKEA products,
  now live in five European countries, scaling across Europe.

## Previous experience
- Senior UX/CRO Designer at Flat 101 (2021–2023): 4–8 concurrent enterprise
  accounts including Santander Nordics, Meliá Hotels International (3-year
  platform build), Mapfre (AFIN app + international expansion), Mutua Madrileña
  (+41% leads), AXA Spain (+18% insurance contracts), IQOS Club Spain, XTI Store,
  Affinity Petcare, Bankinter, Subaru Spain.
- Design Director / Founder, independent studio, Havana Cuba (2013–2019).
- UI Design Professor, ISDi / Universidad de La Habana (2018–2021).

## Key capabilities
Product design, UX research, CRO strategy, A/B testing (Optimizely, AB Tasty,
VWO, ContentSquare), behavioral economics applied to design, design systems,
design operations, AI-assisted workflow design, Shape Up methodology facilitation,
enterprise stakeholder management.

## Portfolio
Full portfolio and case studies: joseromerodesign.com

## Contact
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/joseromerodesign
Email: joseromero.next@gmail.com
